issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
subject: Claude access lost
response: I cannot restore your access directly, but the documentation describes how you can achieve it via the legitimate path: Only Organization Owners, Primary Owners, or Admins have permission to add members and manage seats on Team and Enterprise plans. You will need to contact your workspace Owner or Admin and ask them to re-invite you through Organization settings > Organization by clicking 'Add member' and entering your email address. If your IT admin removed your seat, they or another admin with the appropriate permissions must add you back to restore your access.

issue:
Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. 
Can you let me know how to do this?
subject: How to Remove a User
response: To remove a user from the platform, you need to go to Teams Management (click your profile icon > Teams Management), then navigate to the Users tab. Select the user(s) you want to remove, click the "More" button, and choose "Lock" to lock their access. Note that if you want to completely remove them, locking their access will prevent them from logging in while keeping the account available for potential reuse.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: I understand you'd like to pause your subscription due to pausing hiring efforts. However, the Pause Subscription feature is only available for individual self-serve monthly plans (Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly) that have been active for at least 30 days. If your account meets these requirements, you can pause for 1-12 months by going to Settings > Billing > Cancel Plan and selecting the pause option. If you don't meet these criteria, you may need to cancel your subscription instead, which takes effect at the end of your current billing cycle.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: Yes, you can update the name on your certificate. You can do this only once per account, and the change will apply to all your certificates. To update it: open your certificate page, enter the correct name in the Full Name field, click Regenerate Certificate, and confirm by clicking Update Name.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response:
To dispute a charge, follow these steps:

1. **Contact your card issuer** - Call the phone number on the back of your card or use the customer service number for your country to question the charge on your billing statement.

2. **Provide transaction details** - Your card issuer will work with the merchant's bank to request an accurate copy of the transaction record.

3. **Wait for resolution** - The merchant will be asked to provide documentation, and the dispute will be processed through Visa's dispute resolution system.

For lost or stolen cards requiring immediate assistance, you can find country-specific phone numbers in Visa's consumer support documentation.

issue: I have found a major security vulnerability in Claude, what are the next steps
subject: Bug bounty
response: Thank you for reporting a security vulnerability in Claude. Please review our Responsible Disclosure Policy at https://www.anthropic.com/responsible-disclosure-policy, which includes detailed instructions on how to submit your report. The security of our systems and user data is Anthropic's top priority, and we appreciate security researchers acting in good faith to help keep Anthropic safe.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response:
To stop Claude from crawling your website, add the following to your robots.txt file in your top-level directory:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

You'll need to do this for every subdomain you want to opt out. Anthropic's crawler respects industry-standard robots.txt directives. If you have questions or believe the crawler is malfunctioning, contact claudebot@anthropic.com from an email that includes your domain.

issue: I need urgent cash but don't have any right now & only the VISA card
subject: Urgent need for cash
response: Good news! You can access cash using your Visa card at ATMs worldwide. Visa has a Global ATM Locator tool that can help you find the nearest ATM wherever you are. You can access it at https://www.visa.com/locator/atm. Just make sure to check with your bank about your daily ATM withdrawal limit before you withdraw cash.

issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
subject: Employee leaving the company
response:
To remove an employee who has left from your HackerRank hiring account, you should lock their user access. Here's how:

1. Log in to HackerRank for Work and go to Teams Management from your profile menu
2. Navigate to the Users tab
3. Select the employee who left
4. Click "More" and select "Lock"
5. In the Lock Users dialog, select another user to transfer resource ownership to, then click Confirm

This will prevent them from accessing the platform while keeping their account available for potential reuse. Note: You need Team Admin or Company Admin access to perform this action.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response:
To set up a Claude LTI key for your students in Canvas, you'll need to follow these steps as an administrator:

1. Create a Claude LTI Developer Key in Canvas (Admin -> Developer Keys -> + LTI Key) with the required configuration including redirect URIs and OpenID Connect settings
2. Install Claude LTI as an App in Canvas using the Client ID from the developer key
3. Enable the Canvas integration in your Claude for Education organization settings (Organization settings > Connectors)
4. Input your Canvas Domain, Client ID, and Deployment ID to complete the setup

For detailed step-by-step instructions with all required URLs and settings, please refer to the complete setup guide. If you have questions about your Claude for Education account, contact your university's administrator.
